title: stelis gentryi
intro: Stelis gentryi, also known as Gentry's stelis, is a species of orchid native to Mexico. The plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, with its medicinal properties attributed to the presence of flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Stelis gentryi are said to include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help in reducing stress, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Stelis gentryi can be prepared as a tea or tincture, often combined with other herbs, to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
